title: senecio psilophyllus
intro: Senecio psilophyllus, also known as Groundsnel or Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Groundsnel include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers. Groundsnel is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can be consumed as a supplement or applied topically to affected areas.
